title: COCORRÍNA Reed Diffuser with 8 Sticks, 200ml Gardenia Scented Diffuser, Home Fragrance for Bedroom Bathroom Living Room, Home & Office Decor
features: Long-lasting Fragrance: This room fragrance provides a pleasant aroma for up to 90 days and ensures a continuous fragrance experience in your home. Whether you are working or relaxing, you can enjoy this subtle and long-lasting fragrance and create a cozy atmosphere.

Customization: With the simple addition or removal of the fragrance sticks, you can easily adjust the fragrance intensity. This flexibility allows you to regulate the fragrance concentration according to personal taste and room size at any time, creating an ideal fragrance environment at all times.

Perfect Gift: This room fragrance is the ideal choice for gifts to family and friends and is suitable for various occasions such as holidays, birthdays or thank you gifts. Its elegant design and alluring scent make it an ideal addition to any home decor and lets the recipient feel your appreciation.

Versatile Decoration: This room fragrance effortlessly enhances your indoor and outdoor spaces, whether in the bedroom, living room or on the patio. It is not only a method of fragrance release, but also an aesthetic decorative element that will make your home more enjoyable.
description: Product Description RELAXING SCENTS Breathe in and embrace the delightful aroma of the fragrance from the reed diffuser as it fills the space UP TO 90 DAYS OF FRAGRANCE Make the most of your reed diffuser by flipping the reeds once a week. Our reed diffusers are compliant with fragrance industry regulations that serve to keep customer safe. DÉCOR FOR YOUR HOME & OFFICE Enhance any table, shelf, or counter with this classy reed diffuser.
